acceptance_targets: [chapter_03_booker_01] In the revised material covering the passage now anchored at `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:205` through `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:315`, a reader should be able to identify exactly one denial/resistance beat, one negotiation over whether to tell Cora, and one decision beat about going to Saint's Basin. If any later exchange merely restates that Ezra hid paper or that they need to look, this finding is not resolved.

[chapter_03_dialogue_01] Across the revised beats anchored at `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:91`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:101`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:143`, and `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:225`, only one bare `Do you`/`Do I` challenge may remain. The other challenge lines must be recognizably character-specific on the page even without dialogue tags.

[chapter_03_prose_01] A cold read of the revised passages anchored at `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:211`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:241`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:265`, and `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:323` should let a reader infer the basin/debt argument from local action and object detail without needing more than one overtly aphoristic sentence. If the closing paragraph still requires a second abstract thematic clause after Hester punches the dough, this finding is not resolved.

findings.acceptance_test: In the revised material covering the passage now anchored at `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:205` through `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:315`, a reader should be able to identify exactly one denial/resistance beat, one negotiation over whether to tell Cora, and one decision beat about going to Saint's Basin. If any later exchange merely restates that Ezra hid paper or that they need to look, this finding is not resolved.
findings.evidence: After the Ezra jar lands, the chapter keeps re-arguing a turn it has already earned: `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:205`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:237`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:265`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:275`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:297`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:309`.
findings.problem: The back half reiterates the same conclusion in too many beats: Ezra hid something, the basin matters, Cora must wait, they will go tomorrow. That repetition makes the chapter feel more solved than pressurized, so the revelation loses some destabilizing force before the next chapter can cash it in.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress and re-order the post-vision sequence at `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:205`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:237`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:275`, and `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:297`. Keep one denial beat from Dell, one ethical conflict beat about withholding from Cora, and one concrete logistics beat about the trip; cut or fold the extra explanatory loop now centered at `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:265` and the second reassurance loop at `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:309` into earlier action.

findings.acceptance_test: Across the revised beats anchored at `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:91`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:101`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:143`, and `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:225`, only one bare `Do you`/`Do I` challenge may remain. The other challenge lines must be recognizably character-specific on the page even without dialogue tags.
findings.evidence: The exchange leans on the same bare challenge construction four times: `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:91`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:101`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:143`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:225`.
findings.problem: The recurring `Do I.` / `Do you?` / `Do you.` reversal becomes a visible dialogue tic. Hester and Dell otherwise have distinct idiolects, so this repetition reads less like pressure-shaped speech and more like an authorial device reused once too often.
findings.rewrite_direction: At `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:91`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:101`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:143`, and `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:225`, keep at most one stripped-down challenge. Recast the others into Hester's baking/weather/body-grounded bluntness or Dell's tools-and-motion vocabulary so each leverage shift sounds specific to the speaker instead of mechanically mirrored.

findings.acceptance_test: A cold read of the revised passages anchored at `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:211`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:241`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:265`, and `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:323` should let a reader infer the basin/debt argument from local action and object detail without needing more than one overtly aphoristic sentence. If the closing paragraph still requires a second abstract thematic clause after Hester punches the dough, this finding is not resolved.
findings.evidence: The chapter reaches for thesis-forward verdict sentences more than twice after the concrete evidence has already landed: `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:211`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:241`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:265`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:325`.
findings.problem: Hester's section is strongest when it stays with jars, maps, bread, cough, and dough. In the late middle and closing lines, the prose keeps stepping out to name the chapter's moral geometry in polished aphoristic sentences. Because that happens repeatedly, the voice starts explaining a truth the scene has already embodied.
findings.rewrite_direction: Trim or roughen the thesis-heavy lines at `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:211`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:241`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:265`, and especially the close at `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:323`. Let the map, bread heel, spade plan, and punched-down dough carry the meaning, preserving at most one overtly summarizing line in this stretch.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into queer secrecy, erotic specificity, dust-sick bodies, economic shame, bad bargains, and the humiliations of dependence. When deciding between a tidier scene and a truer one, choose the version that preserves historical pressure and emotional contradiction even if it leaves characters compromised, unsympathetic, or exposed.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If grief, desire, debt, illness, bodily damage, or shame are abstracted at the moment they should become sensory and social, rewrite toward the concrete consequence until the scene stops hiding from itself.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: moderate-high - contractions are the baseline for speech; uncontracted forms should appear only for emphasis, social performance, or character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate structural rhythms across the book: survival set-piece, aftermath inventory, intimate chamber scene, bureaucratic squeeze, outdoor search, quiet communal ritual, preparation without payoff, public reckoning, and departure elegy. Vary scene counts, dialogue density, and where the turn comes from so consecutive chapters never feel built from the same dramatic machine.
prose_style_profile.diction: Plainspoken and period-credible, with agricultural, domestic, and biblical undertones used sparingly; favor exact nouns and verbs over decorative frontier lyricism.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person rotating among Cora, Thea, Dell, August, and Hester, with only brief collective widening when weather or communal memory demands it
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple, pressure-sensitive prose: longer weather and labor sentences that can suddenly snap short at revelation, pain, or shame.
